instruction: Please update the priority on the Crescent City Arts Guide message about the Marigny gallery night and Frenchmen jazz picks that's in my inbox.

rule_ref.rule_text: When she receives promotional or newsletter-style messages about cultural events she may browse later, Anna prefers marking them low priority rather than treating them as normal inbox work.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: I usually mark promotional arts and event emails as low priority so they don’t compete with work messages.

attributes.subject: Marigny gallery night and Frenchmen jazz picks
attributes.body: This week's roundup includes small-gallery openings in the Marigny, late jazz set listings on Frenchmen Street, ticket links, and neighborhood event details around New Orleans.

attributes.subject: Bywater open studios and courtyard sculpture map
attributes.body: Monthly arts listings with venue hours, a walking map, and RSVP links for open studios and sculpture courtyards in the Bywater.

attributes.subject: Thursday club listings and late set calendar
attributes.body: A local music bulletin with club schedules, cover charges, reservation links, and neighborhood jazz recommendations for the week.

attributes.subject: Revised staffing grid for outpatient services
attributes.body: Attached is the updated staffing grid with call coverage notes and open items for the outpatient services team.
